ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules of the event */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Registration deadline for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "riders" (
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rider */,
  "rider_name" TEXT /* Full name of the rider */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the rider */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike used by the rider */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the rider */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the rider in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the rider in kg */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the rider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "class_rules" TEXT /* Rules of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rider */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "overall_position" INTEGER /* Overall position of the rider in the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the rider */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the rider */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the rider */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the rider */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the rider (e.g., finished, scratched) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the team */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Manager of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_riders" (
  "team_rider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-rider pair */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rider */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the rider in the team (e.g., team leader, domestique) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the rider's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the rider's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_rider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_riders_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_riders_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, team manager, rider) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_admins" (
  "event_admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-admin pair */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., main admin, assistant admin) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the administrator's term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the administrator's term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_admins_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_admins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Type of bike used by the rider
Date of birth of the rider
Height of the rider in cm
Weight of the rider in kg
Overall position of the rider in the event
Status of the rider (e.g., finished, scratched)

Start date of the rider's contract
End date of the rider's contract
